final:
// // This module selects in0 when sel is high, and in1 when sel is low.
module top_module(
    input in0,
    input in1,
    input sel,
    output reg out
);always @ (sel, in0, in1) begin
    if (sel) begin
        out <= in1;
    end else begin
        out <= in0;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects in0 when sel is high, and in1 when sel is low.
